content_body: We were thrilled with The Royal Mountain Lodge! What a beautiful cabin with lovely finishes and so much attention to detail! The beds and furniture were all so cozy and perfect for a relaxing vacation! We had a smaller group so we all loved watching movies upstairs in the loft area and we spent a lot of time baking in the kitchen with goods we had purchased at Mercier Orchard. We had everything we could possibly need for a beautiful vacation! We will continue to use this management company as they are always so helpful, friendly and accommodating. We had such a wonderful time that we even decided to stay an extra day. No one wanted to leave. Thank you, CROG! We will be back soon.
title: No One Wanted To Leave!
